chunks.title: The Servant's Call and Mission
chunks.reason: A continuous speech by the Servant describing his divine calling and expanding mission to the nations.

chunks.title: Promise of Restoration and Joy
chunks.reason: An oracle from Yahweh promising covenant restoration, physical comfort for the exiles, and universal rejoicing.

chunks.title: Zion's Lament and Yahweh's Comfort
chunks.reason: A dialogue where Zion questions God's presence and Yahweh responds with promises of return and honor.

chunks.title: The Victory over the Mighty
chunks.reason: An argumentative conclusion asserting God's power to rescue captives and judge oppressors.
